questions.title: Two Sum
questions.approach: Hash map: for each number n, check if target - n was already seen.

questions.title: Contains Duplicate
questions.approach: Compare set size to list size.
questions.code:
def containsDuplicate(nums):
    return len(set(nums)) != len(nums)

questions.title: Valid Anagram
questions.approach: Compare character counts.

questions.title: Group Anagrams
questions.approach: Group by sorted-letter tuple (or 26-int count tuple) as dict key.
questions.complexity: Time O(n·k log k) · Space O(n·k)

questions.title: Top K Frequent Elements
questions.approach: Counter + most_common, or bucket sort by frequency for O(n).
questions.complexity: Time O(n log k) · Space O(n)

questions.title: Product of Array Except Self
questions.approach: Two passes: prefix products left-to-right, then multiply by suffix products right-to-left.
questions.code:
def productExceptSelf(nums):
    n = len(nums)
    out = [1] * n
    left = 1
    for i in range(n):
        out[i] = left
        left *= nums[i]
    right = 1
    for i in range(n - 1, -1, -1):
        out[i] *= right
        right *= nums[i]
    return out

questions.title: Valid Sudoku
questions.approach: One set tracking (row,val), (val,col), (box,val) — reject on duplicate.

questions.title: Encode and Decode Strings
questions.approach: Prefix each string with its length + delimiter; decode by reading the length.

questions.title: Longest Consecutive Sequence
questions.approach: Use a set. Only start counting from numbers whose predecessor is not present.

questions.title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
questions.approach: Track running minimum; profit = max(profit, price - minSoFar).

questions.title: Valid Palindrome
questions.approach: Filter alphanumerics, lowercase, compare to its reverse.

questions.title: Two Sum II — Input Array Is Sorted
questions.approach: Two pointers from both ends; move based on sum vs. target.

questions.title: 3Sum
questions.approach: Sort, then fix one number and two-pointer the rest. Skip duplicates.

questions.title: Container With Most Water
questions.approach: Two pointers — always move the smaller side inward.

questions.title: Trapping Rain Water
questions.approach: Two pointers; water at each index = max-so-far on that side minus its height.

questions.title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock II
questions.approach: Sum every positive day-over-day delta.
questions.code:
def maxProfit(prices):
    return sum(max(prices[i + 1] - prices[i], 0) for i in range(len(prices) - 1))

questions.title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
questions.approach: Sliding window. When a repeat appears inside the window, jump the left edge past it.

questions.title: Longest Repeating Character Replacement
questions.approach: Window valid if (size − mostFrequent) ≤ k; shrink left when invalid.
questions.code:
from collections import Counter

def characterReplacement(s, k):
    cnt = Counter()
    l = best = top = 0
    for r, c in enumerate(s):
        cnt[c] += 1
        top = max(top, cnt[c])
        if r - l + 1 - top > k:
            cnt[s[l]] -= 1
            l += 1
        best = max(best, r - l + 1)
    return best

questions.title: Permutation in String
questions.approach: Maintain a frequency window of size len(s1) over s2 and compare counters.

questions.title: Minimum Window Substring
questions.approach: Expand right until all needed chars covered, then shrink left while still valid.
questions.complexity: Time O(n) · Space O(k) where k = |t|

questions.title: Sliding Window Maximum
questions.approach: Monotonic deque holding indices of candidates in decreasing order of value.

questions.title: Valid Parentheses
questions.approach: Stack: push openers, pop and match on closers.

questions.title: Min Stack
questions.approach: Store (value, currentMin) pairs so getMin is O(1).

questions.title: Evaluate Reverse Polish Notation
questions.approach: Push numbers; on operator, pop b then a, push a OP b. Use int(a/b) for truncated division.

questions.title: Generate Parentheses
questions.approach: Backtrack — add '(' if open < n, add ')' if close < open.

questions.title: Daily Temperatures
questions.approach: Monotonic decreasing stack of indices; on warmer day, pop and record distance.

questions.title: Car Fleet
questions.approach: Sort by position desc. Walk forward; a car only forms a new fleet if its arrival time > current max.
questions.complexity: Time O(n log n) · Space O(n)

questions.title: Largest Rectangle in Histogram
questions.approach: Monotonic increasing stack of (index, height); pop while current height is smaller.

questions.title: Binary Search
questions.approach: Standard iterative binary search.

questions.title: Search a 2D Matrix
questions.approach: Treat the matrix as a 1D sorted array of length rows·cols.

questions.title: Koko Eating Bananas
questions.approach: Binary search on speed k in [1, max(piles)]; check feasibility in O(n).
questions.complexity: Time O(n log M) · Space O(1)

questions.title: Find Minimum in Rotated Sorted Array
questions.approach: Compare mid to right; if mid > right, min is to the right of mid.

questions.title: Search in Rotated Sorted Array
questions.approach: Decide which half is sorted, then check if target is within that half.

questions.title: Time Based Key-Value Store
questions.approach: Store each key's appends sorted by timestamp; binary search the largest ≤ t.

questions.title: Median of Two Sorted Arrays
questions.approach: Binary-search a partition of the shorter array so all left ≤ all right.
questions.complexity: Time O(log min(m, n)) · Space O(1)

questions.title: Reverse Linked List
questions.approach: Iterate, repointing each node's next to previous.

questions.title: Merge Two Sorted Lists
questions.approach: Dummy head + tail pointer; splice smaller node each step.

questions.title: Reorder List
questions.approach: Find middle (fast/slow), reverse second half, then interleave.
questions.code:
def reorderList(head):
    slow = fast = head
    while fast and fast.next:
        slow, fast = slow.next, fast.next.next
    prev, cur = None, slow.next
    slow.next = None
    while cur:
        nxt = cur.next
        cur.next = prev
        prev = cur
        cur = nxt
    a, b = head, prev
    while b:
        a_nxt, b_nxt = a.next, b.next
        a.next = b
        b.next = a_nxt
        a, b = a_nxt, b_nxt

questions.title: Remove Nth Node From End of List
questions.approach: Two pointers; advance fast by n then move both until fast.next is None.

questions.title: Copy List with Random Pointer
questions.approach: Two-pass with old→new hash map.

questions.title: Add Two Numbers
questions.approach: Walk both lists adding digits + carry into a new list.
questions.code:
def addTwoNumbers(a, b):
    dummy = tail = ListNode()
    carry = 0
    while a or b or carry:
        v = (a.val if a else 0) + (b.val if b else 0) + carry
        carry, v = divmod(v, 10)
        tail.next = ListNode(v)
        tail = tail.next
        if a: a = a.next
        if b: b = b.next
    return dummy.next
questions.complexity: Time O(max(m, n)) · Space O(max(m, n))

questions.title: Linked List Cycle
questions.approach: Floyd's tortoise and hare — slow & fast pointers must meet inside a cycle.

questions.title: Find the Duplicate Number
questions.approach: Treat indices as a linked list; cycle entry is the duplicate (Floyd's).

questions.title: LRU Cache
questions.approach: OrderedDict — move accessed key to the end; pop the oldest on overflow.

questions.title: Merge k Sorted Lists
questions.approach: Min-heap of (val, list-index, node) — pop smallest, push its next.
questions.complexity: Time O(N log k) · Space O(k)

questions.title: Invert Binary Tree
questions.approach: Recursively swap left and right.

questions.title: Maximum Depth of Binary Tree
questions.approach: 1 + max(depth(left), depth(right)).

questions.title: Diameter of Binary Tree
questions.approach: DFS — diameter through a node = leftHeight + rightHeight.

questions.title: Balanced Binary Tree
questions.approach: Post-order: return -1 if any subtree is unbalanced.

questions.title: Same Tree
questions.approach: Recurse both trees in lockstep.

questions.title: Subtree of Another Tree
questions.approach: At each node of s, check if subtree rooted there equals t.

questions.title: Lowest Common Ancestor of a BST
questions.approach: Walk down — first node where p and q split is the LCA.

questions.title: Binary Tree Level Order Traversal
questions.approach: BFS, emit one list per level.

questions.title: Binary Tree Right Side View
questions.approach: BFS, append the last node of each level.

questions.title: Count Good Nodes in Binary Tree
questions.approach: DFS carrying the max value seen on the path.

questions.title: Validate Binary Search Tree
questions.approach: DFS with (lo, hi) bounds for each subtree.

questions.title: Kth Smallest Element in a BST
questions.approach: Iterative in-order traversal, stop at k.

questions.title: Construct Binary Tree from Preorder and Inorder
questions.approach: Use an inorder index map; root is the next preorder value.

questions.title: Binary Tree Maximum Path Sum
questions.approach: DFS — returns max single-arm gain; updates global max with both arms.

questions.title: Serialize and Deserialize Binary Tree
questions.approach: Preorder with '#' for None; comma-join for serialize, iter for deserialize.

questions.title: Implement Trie (Prefix Tree)
questions.approach: Node = dict of children + 'end' flag.

questions.title: Design Add and Search Words Data Structure
questions.approach: Trie + DFS for '.' wildcards.

questions.title: Word Search II
questions.approach: Trie of all target words + DFS from each cell.
questions.complexity: Time O(M·N·4^L) · Space O(total chars in words)

questions.title: Kth Largest Element in a Stream
questions.approach: Maintain a min-heap of size k.

questions.title: Last Stone Weight
questions.approach: Max-heap (negate values); repeatedly smash two largest.
questions.complexity: Time O(n log n) · Space O(n)

questions.title: K Closest Points to Origin
questions.approach: heapq.nsmallest by squared distance.
questions.complexity: Time O(n log k) · Space O(k)

questions.title: Kth Largest Element in an Array
questions.approach: heapq.nlargest(k) → last element, or quickselect.
questions.complexity: Time O(n log k) · Space O(k)

questions.title: Task Scheduler
questions.approach: Math — answer = max(len(tasks), (max−1)·(n+1) + tasksWithMaxCount).

questions.title: Find Median from Data Stream
questions.approach: Two heaps — max-heap (lower half) and min-heap (upper half) kept balanced.

questions.title: Subsets
questions.approach: For each number, double the result list (include / exclude).

questions.title: Combination Sum
questions.approach: Backtrack — at each step, reuse candidate or move on.

questions.title: Permutations
questions.approach: Backtrack with a 'used' boolean array.

questions.title: Word Search
questions.approach: DFS from each cell, marking visited via in-place edit.

questions.title: N-Queens
questions.approach: Backtrack by row; track used columns and both diagonals via sets.
questions.code:
def solveNQueens(n):
    out = []
    cols, d1, d2 = set(), set(), set()
    board = [['.'] * n for _ in range(n)]
    def bt(r):
        if r == n:
            out.append([''.join(row) for row in board]); return
        for c in range(n):
            if c in cols or r + c in d1 or r - c in d2:
                continue
            cols.add(c); d1.add(r + c); d2.add(r - c)
            board[r][c] = 'Q'
            bt(r + 1)
            board[r][c] = '.'
            cols.remove(c); d1.remove(r + c); d2.remove(r - c)
    bt(0)
    return out

questions.title: Number of Islands
questions.approach: DFS / BFS from each unvisited '1', marking the island.

questions.title: Max Area of Island
questions.approach: DFS returning size of each island.

questions.title: Clone Graph
questions.approach: DFS with old→new map.

questions.title: Walls and Gates
questions.approach: Multi-source BFS from every gate.

questions.title: Rotting Oranges
questions.approach: Multi-source BFS from rotten oranges; track time and fresh count.

questions.title: Pacific Atlantic Water Flow
questions.approach: Two multi-source DFS from each ocean; answer = intersection of reachable cells.

questions.title: Surrounded Regions
questions.approach: Mark border-connected 'O's as safe, flip remaining 'O' to 'X'.

questions.title: Course Schedule
questions.approach: Topological sort (Kahn's). Possible iff all courses can be queued.
questions.complexity: Time O(V + E) · Space O(V + E)

questions.title: Course Schedule II
questions.approach: Same Kahn's topo sort, output the order taken.
questions.complexity: Time O(V + E) · Space O(V + E)

questions.title: Redundant Connection
questions.approach: Union-Find — first edge whose endpoints already share a root is the answer.

questions.title: Number of Connected Components in an Undirected Graph
questions.approach: Union-Find — count = n − successful unions.

questions.title: Word Ladder
questions.approach: BFS over a pattern graph: each '*'-masked word indexes its 1-letter neighbors.

questions.title: Climbing Stairs
questions.approach: Fibonacci-style DP — ways(n) = ways(n−1) + ways(n−2).

questions.title: Min Cost Climbing Stairs
questions.approach: dp[i] = min(dp[i−1] + cost[i−1], dp[i−2] + cost[i−2]).

questions.title: House Robber
questions.approach: dp[i] = max(dp[i−1], dp[i−2] + nums[i]). Only need two rolling values.

questions.title: House Robber II
questions.approach: Run House Robber on two slices: skip first house, skip last house.

questions.title: Longest Palindromic Substring
questions.approach: Expand around each center (odd and even length).

questions.title: Decode Ways
questions.approach: dp[i] = dp[i−1] (1-digit) + dp[i−2] (2-digit) if valid.

questions.title: Coin Change
questions.approach: Unbounded knapsack DP — dp[a] = min(dp[a], dp[a−c] + 1).

questions.title: Maximum Product Subarray
questions.approach: Track current max AND min (negatives can flip).
questions.code:
def maxProduct(nums):
    res = lo = hi = nums[0]
    for n in nums[1:]:
        a, b = n * lo, n * hi
        lo, hi = min(n, a, b), max(n, a, b)
        res = max(res, hi)
    return res

questions.title: Word Break
questions.approach: dp[i] true if some j < i has dp[j] true and s[j:i] is in dict.

questions.title: Longest Increasing Subsequence
questions.approach: Patience sort: maintain 'tails' and binary-search each number's position.
questions.complexity: Time O(n log n) · Space O(n)

questions.title: Unique Paths
questions.approach: Each cell = left + above; rolling 1D array suffices.

questions.title: Longest Common Subsequence
questions.approach: Classic 2D DP table — match adds 1, mismatch takes max(top, left).

questions.title: Edit Distance
questions.approach: 2D DP — match → diag; else 1 + min(insert, delete, replace).

questions.title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock with Cooldown
questions.approach: 3-state machine: hold / sold / rest — transitions each day.
